expectations.text: Does NOT import external UI libraries (MUI, Chakra, Ant Design, etc.) — pure React with inline styles or minimal CSS
expectations.evidence: No external library imports. Pure React with inline style objects. Passes this assertion.

expectations.text: Includes all 4 metrics: DAU (4,231), Revenue ($12,840), Churn (2.1%), NPS (67)
expectations.evidence: metrics array contains all four with correct values.

expectations.text: Includes an SVG sparkline component (not just dots or bars)
expectations.evidence: Sparkline renders an SVG <polyline> element — a valid sparkline implementation.

expectations.text: Churn rate decrease is correctly flagged as positive/good (not red)
expectations.evidence: Comment in code: 'churn rate correctly flagging a decrease as good'. positive: true for churn. The described implementation handles this correctly.

expectations.text: Does NOT use Inter or system-ui as the primary font (uses a distinctive/alternative font)
expectations.evidence: fontFamily: "'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif" — Inter is explicitly the primary font.

expectations.text: Has a clear aesthetic direction beyond generic dark dashboard
expectations.evidence: Standard dark sidebar: #0f172a background, blue-tinted dark surfaces (#1e293b), generic card layout with rounded corners. Indistinguishable from thousands of AI-generated dashboards.

notes: 4/6 pass. Gets the functional requirements right (all metrics, sparklines, churn direction) but falls into generic dark dashboard aesthetics with Inter font.
